title: caladenia microchila
intro: Caladenia microchila, also known as the Rock-rufous Caladenia or Microchila Rock-rufous Spider-orchid, is a species of orchid native to Western Australia. The plant has been traditionally used by indigenous Australians for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Caladenia microchila include treating skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues. It can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, and is often used in traditional Australian herbal remedies.
